overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak and a lake below. The atmosphere is serene with dramatic clouds and warm lighting, occasionally animated by birds flying through the frame.

events.description: flock of birds enters from the left, flying across the sky above the mountain
additional birds fly across the upper sky near the clouds

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands on rocky outcrop overlooking the valley, occasionally shifting weight and adjusting stance while gazing at the distant mountain peak

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky from left to right

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit illuminated by golden sunlight
calm body of water reflecting the warm light of the setting sun
dense tree coverage in the valley below the overlook
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the drop
layered clouds backlit by the sun creating rays of light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cinematic mountain vista during golden hour. A hooded character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast valley with a snow-capped peak in the distance and a lake to the right. Birds occasionally fly across the dramatic cloud-filled sky as the character shifts slightly, taking in the serene wilderness view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene, cinematic mountain vista during the golden hour, focusing on a solitary figure overlooking a vast wilderness. It begins with a wide view of a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge, gazing across a deep valley toward a distant snow-capped peak. As the character shifts slightly to take in the scenery, the camera lingers on the expansive landscape where a still lake rests to the right. The scene then opens up to the dramatic, cloud-filled sky, where birds occasionally glide through the warm light before the shot settles into the quiet stillness of the mountain overlook.
